title: Google Just Revealed What Comes After AGI And It’s Shocking
summary: A YouTube video discussing Google DeepMind's "From AGI to ASI" paper, which argues that AGI may be the starting point rather than the endpoint of AI advancement. The video suggests that once human-level AI is achieved, copied, and accelerated, the transition to superintelligence could matter more than AGI itself.
writeup: The video covers Google DeepMind's "From AGI to ASI" paper, which frames AGI as a starting point for AI progress rather than its conclusion. The central argument is that once human-level AI exists, the ability to copy and accelerate it makes the transition to artificial superintelligence more consequential than reaching AGI itself. The discussion touches on AI agents and test-time compute as factors in that shift.
